content:
leamas pushed 9 commits to branch ubuntu/focal. Commits by leamas (7) and Alec Leamas (2).

  • d/changhelog: provisionary 5.8.10~alpha2+dfsg-1ubuntu1 entry (133fa6d1cca)
  • d/control: downgrade debhelper-compat (48c2e8e5333)
  • d/gbp.conf: Set debian-branch (9472242bf36)
  • d/control: Adjust b-d:libgdk-pixbuf2.0-dev (cea27f1790b)
  • d/patches: new patch blocking time sensitive test. (242f73fc79b)
  • d/not-installed: blacklist gtest artifacts (eae09768d1b)
  • d/copyright: Update to match new libs/shapelib (4955ffe2a68)
  • d/control: Update VCS headers to match openpn/opencpn (9c042329aca)
  • d/changelog: New 20.04 bpo version (1a9d2064309)
